title: Idea Jam gives students opportunity to collaborate, pitch proposal to enhance campus life
summary_en: Winning team pitched plan for another convenient grab-and-go dining option.
title_cn: “创意献策会”为学生提供协作契机 可提交优化校园生活提案

title: Mizzou researchers turn up the heat on tomatoes
summary_en: Show Me Research project focuses on why tomatoes don’t produce the compound that gives peppers their spice.
title_cn: 密苏里大学研究人员开展番茄耐热性相关研究

title: Mizzou students work behind the scenes to support nursing simulation center
summary_en: Work-study students ensure the Sinclair School of Nursing’s simulation center operates flawlessly, preparing future nurses for life-saving moments.
title_cn: 密苏里大学学生在幕后为护理模拟中心提供支持

title: Mizzou scholars earn prestigious NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
title_cn: 密苏里大学学者荣获美国国家科学基金会享有盛誉的研究生研究奖学金

title: Mizzou’s College of Veterinary Medicine provides specialized surgery for a smoother recovery
summary_en: Through early detection and collaborative expertise, Cooper became a candidate an advanced surgical option not widely available in the region.
title_cn: 密苏里大学兽医学院提供专科手术服务助力实现更顺畅康复

title: Meet a Mizzou involvement ambassador
summary_en: As an involvement ambassador, Catelynn Liniger empowers students to find their place, build meaningful connections and make the most of their Mizzou experience.
title_cn: 认识一位密苏里大学校园参与大使

title: Equipped with real-world training, Mizzou graduate launches career in nuclear medicine
summary_en: Gracie Loepker, BHS ’25, works alongside physicians to perform scans and administer radiopharmaceuticals at Barnes-Jewish Hospital.
title_cn: 密苏里大学毕业生依托实操培训开启核医学职业生涯

title: Mizzou’s bench-to-bedside efforts support a new drug for a neuromuscular disorder with no cure
summary_en: The drug, ignaseclant, helped people with Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease in a clinical trial at Mizzou’s NextGen Precision Health building.
title_cn: 密苏里大学“从实验室到临床”工作助力研发针对尚无治愈方案的神经肌肉疾病的新药
